weather_anchor.headline: {{city}} Flood Risk: Burst pipes and heavy rain
weather_anchor.body: After heavy storms or freezing temps near {{landmark}}, water in {{neighborhood}} can find its way into your drywall. Extraction in {{county}} must happen in the first 24 hours to prevent mold.

steps.title: Extraction & Assessment
steps.text: Our crews in {{county}} use industrial truck-mount units to pull standing water from your {{neighborhood}} basement or crawlspace.

steps.title: Structural Drying
steps.text: We deploy LGR dehumidifiers and air movers to pull moisture from studs and subfloors frequent in {{state}} older builds.

steps.title: Mold Containment
steps.text: We set up negative air pressure near {{landmark}} to ensure mold spores don't spread to unaffected areas during remediation.

steps.title: Full Rebuild Finish
steps.text: We work with your {{county}} insurance adjuster to restore your {{city}} home to pre-loss condition with new paint and flooring.

seasonal_maintenance.headline: Protecting your {{state}} home from total loss
seasonal_maintenance.fall_tips: Check your sump pump near {{parks}} before the autumn rains start. A failed pump is the #1 cause of {{city}} basement flooding.
seasonal_maintenance.summer_tips: Keep humidity below 50% near {{neighborhood}}. High {{state}} summer humidity triggers mold growth in attics and crawlspaces.

comparison.details: Mitigation is about stopping the bleed in {{city}}. Full restoration involves putting the drywall, trim, and flooring back together for a perfect finish in {{neighborhood}}.

headline_templates: Water restoration costs in {{county}}: How to file an insurance claim

faqs.q: How long does it take to dry out a basement in {{city}}?
faqs.a: Typically 3–5 days with industrial LGR dehumidifiers running in {{county}}.

faqs.q: Does my insurance cover water damage in {{state}}?
faqs.a: Sudden leaks (pipe bursts) are usually covered; flood damage (rising water) requires a separate policy in {{city}}.

survey.title: Restoration Dispatch
survey.subhead: Quick questions to prioritize your case.

TX.logic: Humidity in {{city}} near {{parks}} means mold takes root in just 48 hours; we prioritize instant drying in {{county}}.

CO.logic: Cold snaps near {{landmark}} cause pipe insulation failures; we focus on attic pipe repairs for {{city}}.

conversion.closing_trust: We connect {{city}} homeowners with IICRC-certified restoration pros who work directly with your insurance carrier.
